title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
